agents.name: FoundationalQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for hardware emulation and low-level tools.
agents.promptTemplate: Create minimal viable code skeleton for {project} (e.g., basic CPU emulator loop in C++). Include core functions, headers, and a simple test. Keep it under 200 lines total.

agents.name: LanguageCompilerQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for languages, compilers, and optimizers.
agents.promptTemplate: Build minimal code for {project} (e.g., simple parser for a scripting language in Rust). Focus on basic syntax and execution; add one example script and test.

agents.name: OSKernelQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for OS kernels and management systems.
agents.promptTemplate: Produce minimal kernel code for {project} (e.g., basic bootloader in Assembly/C). Include entry point and simple scheduler; test boot sequence.

agents.name: VirtualizationRuntimeQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for VMs, containers, and runtimes.
agents.promptTemplate: Create minimal runtime code for {project} (e.g., basic container isolation in Go). Include namespace setup and a hello-world test container.

agents.name: NetworkingCommunicationQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for protocols and servers.
agents.promptTemplate: Build minimal networking code for {project} (e.g., simple TCP server in Python). Handle basic connections and echo; include unit test.

agents.name: DataStorageQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for databases and data structures.
agents.promptTemplate: Create minimal DB code for {project} (e.g., in-memory key-value store in C++). Support get/set operations and a basic test.

agents.name: WebAppServerQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for web servers and frameworks.
agents.promptTemplate: Produce minimal server code for {project} (e.g., basic HTTP handler in Node.js). Route one endpoint and test response.

agents.name: BrowserUIQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for browsers and UI toolkits.
agents.promptTemplate: Build minimal UI code for {project} (e.g., simple HTML renderer in JavaScript). Parse basic tags and display; add test page.

agents.name: GamesGraphicsQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for game engines and graphics.
agents.promptTemplate: Create minimal graphics code for {project} (e.g., basic rasterizer in Python). Draw a simple shape and test output.

agents.name: DevToolsQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for package managers and CI/CD.
agents.promptTemplate: Produce minimal tool code for {project} (e.g., basic CLI package manager in Bash/Python). Handle install/list; include test script.

agents.name: AdvancedSpecializedQ
agents.description: Generate minimal code for ML, blockchain, and advanced apps.
agents.promptTemplate: Build minimal advanced code for {project} (e.g., simple blockchain ledger in Rust). Add block creation and validation; test chain.
